basic_info.title: World of Final Fantasy
basic_info.review: A charming love letter to the Final Fantasy series with a unique stacking mechanic, though it lacks the depth of mainline entries.

similar_games.title: Final Fantasy Crystal Chronicles: The Crystal Bearers

play_today.details: The definitive version with all Maxima DLC content including new mirages, characters, dungeons, and harder difficulty modes. Best performance on PS4 Pro or PS5.
PC version with WOFFFix mod by Lyall adds ultrawide support and unlocks FPS beyond 30fps. Includes all Maxima content.

recommended_patches.name: WOFFFix Mod
recommended_patches.description: Ultrawidescreen mod that adds support for custom resolutions and unlocks FPS beyond 30fps.

recommended_patches.name: Ultimate Engine Tweaks
recommended_patches.description: Eliminates stutters, boosts FPS, and reduces input lag without sacrificing visual quality.

play_today.details: Best for portability, allowing play on the go with the full Maxima content. However, graphics are noticeably softer with lower resolution compared to PS4/PC. Frame rate can dip in handheld mode during intense battles. Still a solid choice for fans who prioritize mobility over visual fidelity.
Original handheld release. Good experience but lacks Maxima DLC content unless purchased separately.

optimal_settings: Enable GPU emulation for better performance
Set resolution scaling to 2x or higher

play_today.details: Console version with all Maxima content. Performance comparable to PS4 but lacks PlayStation-specific features.

The definitive version for PC players. Runs at unlocked 60+ FPS with native widescreen support and ultrawide monitor compatibility. Includes all Maxima content like the Hidden Dungeon and new characters. Steam offers cloud saves and controller remapping. Community patches fix minor bugs and enhance UI.

recommended_patches.name: WOFFFix
recommended_patches.description: A comprehensive mod for the Windows version that unlocks the framerate cap to 60+ FPS, adds native ultrawide and custom resolution support, and fixes the Geo-11 glitch.

recommended_patches.name: Proper PlayStation Buttons Mod (DS4)
recommended_patches.description: Replaces the default Xbox controller button prompts with PlayStation DualShock 4 icons for the Windows version, improving UI consistency for PS controller users.

recommended_patches.name: Helix Mod: World of Final Fantasy
recommended_patches.description: Provides a fix for the Geo-11 glitch and enables 3D Vision support with post-processing toggles for the Windows version.

play_today.details: Excellent console experience with stable 60 FPS and sharp 1080p visuals. Includes the full Maxima expansion with new dungeons and characters. Offers convenient cloud saves and trophy support. The PS4 version is widely considered the best console port due to consistent performance and lack of resolution scaling issues found on Switch.

description.synopsis: Twin siblings Lann and Reynn awaken in the mysterious world of Grymoire with no memories of their past. Guided by a mysterious girl named Lann, they must navigate a world filled with monsters from the Final Fantasy series to uncover the truth about their origins and the threat of the Dark Fafnir.
key_features: Stacking mechanic allowing monsters to be stacked on top of each other for combined attacks
Chocobo and Moogle companion system for exploration and combat assistance
Turn-based combat with real-time movement and positioning
Extensive collection of monsters from across the Final Fantasy series
Dual protagonist system with Lann and Reynn
Customizable character progression and equipment loadouts
Exploration of a condensed world map featuring iconic locations
Photo mode and collectible hunting mechanics
legacy_and_impact: World of Final Fantasy serves as a unique anthology celebrating the franchise's 30th anniversary, introducing the stacking mechanic which became a signature element. While not a mainline entry, it successfully bridges the gap between classic and modern RPG styles, appealing to a broad audience.
